name: Killer Salza (Hot,hot,hot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried chile pequin pods for 3 to 4 hours in vinegar, making sure they are fully submerged. Drain and discard the soaking liquid.
2. Add all ingredients except tomato juice to a blender and blend until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a bowl and stir in 1 cup of tomato juice (up to 2 cups if desired). Stir well to combine.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before using.
This sauce is very hot due to the use of chile pequin pods, which are among the hottest peppers available. Exercise caution when handling or consuming this dish.
